pi_items.source: Task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the verifier script (verifier.py) are entirely missing from the environment.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for visual_studio_2022_env configure_app_manifest_elevation task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the verifier script (verifier.py) are entirely missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely. The target project directory structure requirements and expected executable file paths match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description.
